title: Bingo Baby Shower Game Cards for 25 Guests, Baby in Bloom Pink Floral Design
features: Funny Baby Shower Games - Each set contains 25 baby shower bingo cards, enough for you to invite guests to your party

Quality Material - All the baby in bloom party game cards are made of durable 300gsm tripled coated paper to ensure high quality and durability, and are beautifully printed. A smooth writing experience will make your party stand out
Perfect Size & Design - The baby bingo cards feature a double-sided design and measure 5x7 inches, allowing them to be handled and displayed with ease and elegance

Versatile Use - The floral and butterfly baby bingo for baby girl boy shower game cards adapt seamlessly to diverse indoor and outdoor gatherings, include baby announcement party, gender reveal party, etc

Memorable Moments - This bingo baby shower game cards features an elegant design of flowers and butterflies. It is a unique baby in bloom baby shower decorations and party favors, creating a lasting memento for the parents-to-be
